subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-04-26
subcodes.first_line: I wish to speak upon the subject of divine unity, the oneness of God, before this revered assemblage… O Thou kind Lord! O Thou Who art generous and merciful!
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این انجمن محترم میخواهم در خصوص وحدانیت الهیه تکلم کنم بدیهی است که حقیقت
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @oneness; unity of religion
